_comment: Phase 274 / STATS-05 -- Simplified Chinese translations for new SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_* trans-units. Brand 'FSB' and 'MCP' kept verbatim per DO-NOT-TRANSLATE.md. Placeholders preserved byte-for-byte.
SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_SECTION_HEADING: <x id="START_TAG_SPAN" ctype="x-span" equiv-text="<span [attr.translate]="'no'">"/>FSB<x id="CLOSE_TAG_SPAN" ctype="x-span" equiv-text="</span>"/> 遥测
SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_SECTION_SUB: 实时显示 <x id="START_TAG_SPAN" ctype="x-span" equiv-text="<span [attr.translate]="'no'">"/>FSB<x id="CLOSE_TAG_SPAN" ctype="x-span" equiv-text="</span>"/> 安装的匿名使用情况。每 5 分钟刷新一次。
SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_CHART_ACTIVE_NOW_LEGE: 活跃用户（5 分钟窗口）
SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_CHART_AGENTS_RUNNING_: 活跃代理（10 分钟窗口）
SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_CHART_AVG_AGENTS: 每位活跃用户的平均代理数
SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_CHART_AVG_AGENTS_LEGE: 每位活跃用户的平均活跃代理数
